name: integration-unassigned-tasks-endpoint
description: Tests the /unassigned-tasks endpoint integration with the UnassignedTasksAPIClient, ensuring it returns unassigned tasks for a given date.
input: POST request to /unassigned-tasks with a valid date in the JSON body.
output: JSON response with success=true and a list of unassigned_tasks.
error_scenarios: API returns 500 if the unassigned tasks API client fails
